Video.summary: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive Klee Kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.
Video.title: Battle of Britain

Video.summary: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.
Video.title: Hounds From Hell

Video.summary: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.
Video.title: Army Brats

Video.summary: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.
Video.title: High Anxiety

Video.summary: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.
Video.title: Cesar Conquers London

Video.summary: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.
Video.title: Jersey Shore Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: Home-Wrecking Hounds

Video.summary: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.
Video.title: Hounded By Fear

Video.summary: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.
Video.title: Bad Dogs of Comedy

Video.summary: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.
Video.title: Homeboys and Hounds

Video.summary: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.
Video.title: Playboy Playmates

Video.summary: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.
Video.title: Pack Leaders in Training

Video.summary: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 2)

Video.summary: A beagle has a chewing problem; three German shepherds must be kept apart; a bichon frise dislikes her owner.
Video.title: The Other Woman

Video.summary: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.
Video.title: Project Runaway!

Video.summary: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.
Video.title: The Power of the Pack

Video.summary: Nevada inmates learn how to train dogs to be adopted; an ex-show dog and his companion have a power struggle.
Video.title: Pups on Parole, Eton & Dolly

Video.summary: A Yorkie attacks his leash, plants and a fellow Yorkie; a bull terrier attacks larger dogs; a Jack Russell terrier/Italian greyhound mix barks constantly while her owner is at work.
Video.title: The Incredible Hulk

Video.summary: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.
Video.title: Boogie-Boarding Beagle

Video.summary: Cesar helps an adopted terrier mix overcome her terrible fear of men and attempts to solve a pit bull's unhealthy fascination with chewing on rocks.
Video.title: Smashin' Punkin

Video.summary: Cesar's toughest cases have included a bulldog that munched on skateboards, a dog that gnawed garden hoses and basketballs, and a pit bull with issues.
Video.title: Cesar's Toughest Cases

Video.summary: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.
Video.title: London Calling

Video.summary: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.
Video.title: Horrible Hounds of the U.K.
